description: CompositionCream T-shirt made of 100% polyester FitDry fabric, has a V-neck with a spread collar, short sleeves, embroidered wicket logo on the upper back below the collar and embroidered swoosh logo on the upper left chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursWash inside outDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowDo not iron or dry cleanGet ready for an aggressive game of cricket in this cream T-shirt from nike. Team this T-shirt with track pants and performance shoes.
